decision: open a narrow Promise.resolve recovery slice only for dependency-closed non-thenable-safe inputs

required_evidence: qualified global Symbol evidence for Promise.resolve
unshadowed receiver Symbol evidence for Promise
non-thenable-safe argument proof: exact literal, nullish global, or strict-exact-safe value with Number/String domain evidence
implemented_recovery.new_exact_positive: safe Promise.resolve factories over proven scalar values now form an exact semantic family when the value fingerprint clears the non-degenerate floor
